# Artenimol 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Artenimol 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Artenimol</strong> 目前有 <strong>2 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Artenimol 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Eurartesim is indicated for the treatment of uncomplicated Plasmodium falciparum malaria in adults, children and infants 6 months and over and weighing 5 kg or more. Consideration should be given to...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>malaria（99.9%）</li>
<li>Smouldering systemic mastocytosis（98.7%）</li>
<li>lymphoadenopathic mastocytosis with eosinophilia（98.4%）</li>
<li>systemic mastocytosis（98.3%）</li>
<li>Plasmodium vivax malaria（97.3%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid factor-positive polyarticular juvenile idiopathic arthritis（97.2%）</li>
<li>juvenile chronic polyarthritis（96.6%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid nodulosis（96.6%）</li>
<li>juvenile idiopathic arthritis（96.6%）</li>
<li>West syndrome（96.3%）</li>
<li>intellectual disability, X-linked, with or without seizures, arx-related（95.9%）</li>
<li>echinococcus granulosus infectious disease（94.3%）</li>
<li>alveolar echinococcosis（93.2%）</li>
<li>gastrin secretion abnormality（93.0%）</li>
<li>cystic echinococcosis（93.0%）</li>
<li>enterobiasis（92.4%）</li>
<li>pseudoachondroplasia（92.1%）</li>
<li>juvenile arthritis due to defect in LACC1（92.0%）</li>
<li>acne (disease)（91.0%）</li>
<li>monosomy X（90.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/artenimol/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
